title: BarStrain
description: BarStrain: Resulting axial strain along the bar in local coordinates.

Axial.description: Axial strain induced by an axial force along the Bar axis. Positive for elongation, negative for contraction. Property has a quantity of type Strain measured in [-].

ShearY.description: Shear strain along the local y-axis. Generally minor axis shear strain. Property has a quantity of type Strain measured in [-].

ShearZ.description: Shear strain along the local z-axis. Generally major axis shear strain. Property has a quantity of type Strain measured in [-].

BendingY_Top.description: Strain induced by bending about the local y-axis at the 'uppermost' extreme fiber. Generally the major axis bending strains in one of the extreme fibers. Property has a quantity of type Strain measured in [-].

BendingY_Bot.description: Strain induced by bending about the local y-axis at the 'lowermost' extreme fiber. Generally the major axis bending strains in one of the extreme fibers. Property has a quantity of type Strain measured in [-].

BendingZ_Top.description: Strain induced by bending about the local z-axis at the 'uppermost' extreme fiber. Generally the minor axis bending strains in one of the extreme fibers. Property has a quantity of type Strain measured in [-].

BendingZ_Bot.description: Strain induced by bending about the local z-axis at the 'lowermost' extreme fiber. Generally the minor axis bending strains in one of the extreme fibers. Property has a quantity of type Strain measured in [-].

CombAxialBendingPos.description: Worst case elongation (axial strain) from combined axial and bending in two directions. Property has a quantity of type Strain measured in [-].

CombAxialBendingNeg.description: Worst case contraction (axial strain) from combined axial and bending in two directions. Property has a quantity of type Strain measured in [-].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

Position.description: Position on the bar as normalised length, i.e. 0 for start, 1 for end and 0.5 for middle.

Divisions.description: How many division points along the bar was used when extracting this result. This generally means that this many results with the same ObjectId, ResultCase and TimeStep was extracted.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
